analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet neutrally announces that the EU and China held their 11th annual consultations on security and defence, with a link to read more. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – Not supported; no reference to EU history, overcoming obstacles, or past achievements. EU2 (united) – Not supported; no mention of EU internal unity or solidarity among member states. EU3 (useful for citizens) – Not supported; no claim about benefits to EU citizens or internal policies. EU4 (avant-garde political actor) – Not supported; no assertion of EU pioneering leadership or regulation. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – Not supported; no mention of democracy/human rights leadership. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – Partially relevant theme (international consultations on security/defence could imply cooperation and multilateral engagement), but the tweet is purely informational without attributing positive global impact or EU’s role in improving peace/well-being. Therefore, it does not explicitly promote this narrative. Conclusion: The tweet is a neutral event announcement that does not promote any listed narrative explicitly.
